The Vault v0.2.5 refreshes the Vault Agent Queue overview layout.

Highlights:
- Separates queue totals, executor activity, type breakdown, recent tasks, task details, and live events into clearer sections.
- Adds sorted task-type breakdown chips for faster queue scanning.
- Adds a status rail to recent task rows so task state is visible at a glance.
- Improves selected task details so queue inspection is less cramped.
- Keeps the bundled `vault-memory` MCP sidecar release packaging intact.

This build packages the desktop app and the bundled `vault-memory` MCP sidecar runtime. After installing, open The Vault and use Settings -> Client setup to connect Codex, Claude Desktop, or Claude Code.
